Off Calendar Dec-11-2006 Continued To Jan-29-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Jonathan Ferdon appearing for Public Administrator. Counsel was informed by the broker that escrow has been closed. The check has not come in. They are still looking for benefits from UCSF. Matter is continued to 1/29/07 for status. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Karla Davis, CSR#12998. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status
Off Calendar Nov-27-2006 Continued To Dec-11-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Krista Wong appearing in Court. Mr. Ferdon and Mr. Lieberman are not in Court. Ms. Wong was informed by her counsel that the hearing date have been continued. Court is continuing this status to 12/11. If counsel had worked out another date, they are to notify the Court. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Susan Lee CSR#4280. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (Joint Plant No.082-007-070-01a, Apn.082-070-010, Cnty Of San Mateo, Ca)
Off Calendar Oct-26-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Jonathan Ferdon appearing for administrator. Sale is confirmed at $10,000.00 for 1/16 interest. Counsel will prepare the order. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status
Off Calendar Oct-02-2006 Continued To Nov-27-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Jonathan Ferdon appearing for administrator. Krista Wong is in court. Her counsel Mr. Lieberman is not in court. Mr. Ferdon reports to the Court that they have received a bid for the San Mateo property. He will file a Report of Sale and Petition for Confirmation today. Escrow is closed on the SF property. Matter is continued to 11/27 for status. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status
Off Calendar Aug-07-2006 Continued To Oct-02-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: APPEARENCE BY JOHNATHAN FERDON, PUBLIC ADIMINSTRIATOR
PUBLIC ADMINNINSTRATOR IS TRYING TO GET 90% REGARDING THE SALE PF THEB REAL PROPERTY. THERE IS JUST 1/16 INTEREST OF THE REAL PROPERTY. IF THE PUBLIC ADMIN. CAN NOT GET 90%, THE COURT CAN NOT CONFIRM SALE OF THE REAL PROEPERTY.
JUDGE: DOROTHY MCMATH; CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON, RPTR:CHRISTINA PAXTON

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status
Off Calendar May-08-2006 Continued To Aug-07-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Jonathan Ferdon appearing for administrator. Michael Lieberman appearing for and with Krista Wong and her son. Mr. Ferdon informs the court that property was sold. Escrow is not closed. He will have to wait until escrow closes and see if there is any interest to buy the interest in the San Mateo property before closing the estate. Matter is continued to 8/7 for status to close the estate. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
